column.text:
• Kansas City Royals transferred 2B Jonathan India to the 60-day injured list with a left shoulder subluxation.
• Houston Astros designated catcher César Salazar for assignment.
• Houston Astros designated outfielder Rhylan Thomas for assignment.
• Atlanta Braves designated catcher Chadwick Tromp for assignment.
• Baltimore Orioles designated right-hander Eduarniel Núñez for assignment.
• Houston Astros signed free agent first baseman LaMonte Wade Jr.
• Texas Rangers activated shortstop Corey Seager from the 10-day injured list.
• Toronto Blue Jays sent right-hander Dylan Cease on a rehab assignment to Buffalo Bisons.
• Cleveland Guardians sent shortstop Gabriel Arias on a rehab assignment to Columbus Clippers.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
